one_line: SourceA is an AI execution platform that ships real builds with governance-safe receipts.
hero_eval_line: Evaluate in 5 minutes with sourcea-boot — PASS or BLOCK on your browser and disk.

hero.kicker: Proof-backed MVPs · acquisition systems, shipped fast
hero.category_tag: AI execution platform — proof built in
hero.lead: Choose a lane, run one bounded action, then get proof on disk. You can verify with Forge Terminal, sourcea-boot, or live proof without a calendar call.
hero.taxonomy_html: SourceA is the product — AI execution platform with proof on every run. Forge is the execution engine — prompt forge, agents, and governed delivery desk.

hero_denylist: We show real work on a call
brain_subtitle: AI execution platform — builds, automations, and agent workflows
composer_placeholder: What are you trying to run, build, or automate?
brain_greet_html:
Hi — I'm Brain. SourceA is an AI execution platform — real builds, automations, and agent workflows, with a verifiable receipt on every run.
Try Forge Terminal, run sourcea-boot on /eval, or ask for examples — no pitch until you want one.
brand_definition: AI execution platform (Forge) with built-in proof
executive_summary: SourceA helps founders and agencies turn AI into production work — not just chat. Forge runs scoped builds, automations, and agent workflows; every run is tracked and validated so clients see what was done and why.
external_headline: Turn AI into real production work — builds, automations, and agent workflows through Forge, with proof built in.
outcome_bullets: Run real AI work (not just chat)
Automate research, content, and dev tasks
Show clients what ran and why (proof built in)

commercial_offers.proof: dispatch policy + workflow receipts + health log

pricing_rule: Never lead with price — problem → solution → example → value → price only when asked
agentic_first_law: If the site can show it, strangers never need a founder call. Calls are optional escalation only.
